messages.text: hi! my civic is making a grinding noise when I brake. how soon could you get me in?
Hi Henry! Sounds like brake pads — could be a safety issue. Earliest opening is Thursday 10am for full inspection + pad replacement, around $260. Want me to hold it?
Confirmed Thursday 10am. Texting you the confirmation now. Drive carefully until then. ✓
Hi! Saw your shop on Yelp. Need a quote for timing belt replacement — 2018 Toyota Corolla.
Hi Marisol! Good news — your 2018 Corolla has a timing CHAIN, not a belt. No replacement needed. When was your last service?
Oh wow, didn't know that. About 50k miles ago.
Perfect — you're due for a 60k checkup, $180. Wednesday 2pm or Friday 9am?
is anyone awake?? my subaru is shifting really weird, almost stalled at a light
Hi David! I'm Sofía's after-hours assistant. CVT shifting issues — common in Subarus 2014–2018. Don't drive far. Can you bring it in at 8am tomorrow?
Booked 8am. Sofía will call you in the morning to confirm. Try not to drive until then. ✓
